study.title: Quantum Diffusion Models literature search
study.description: Reproducible search strategy for quantum diffusion model literature across arXiv and Crossref DOI-prefix scoped IEEE/Springer records.

date_range.interpretation: Publication year greater than or equal to 2020, matching the original notebook MIN_YEAR = 2020

queries.rationale: Exact phrase for the central construct.

queries.arxiv_query: all:"quantum neural network" AND all:"diffusion model"
all:"quantum machine learning" AND all:"diffusion model"
all:"quantum" AND all:"denoising diffusion probabilistic model"
all:"quantum" AND all:"score matching" AND all:"diffusion"
all:"quantum" AND all:"Schrödinger bridge" AND all:"diffusion"
all:"quantum" AND all:"Schrodinger bridge" AND all:"diffusion"
